headline: Super Micro Computer Deepens AI Data Center Role With New Alliances
summary: Over the past two weeks, Super Micro Computer (NasdaqGS:SMCI) has announced multiple new collaborations focused on AI data center infrastructure. The company signed a memorandum of understanding with SK Telecom and Schneider Electric to provide pre-fabricated, modular AI data centers. SMCI is working with BlockchAIn LLC on integrated, power-secured AI platforms aimed at data center deployment. Mirantis has validated Supermicro's modular server architecture for Kubernetes-native AI...

headline: Supermicro Reveals DCBBS® with New NVIDIA Vera Rubin NVL72, HGX Rubin NVL8, and Vera CPU Systems, Designed to Accelerate Customer Time-to-Market
summary: Super Micro Computer, Inc. (NASDAQ: SMCI), a Total IT Solution Provider for Cloud Computing, AI/ML, Storage, and 5G/Edge, today unveiled its upcoming system portfolio powered by the NVIDIA Vera Rubin platform. As data centers transform into AI factories, producing intelligence at massive scale, agentic reasoning, long-context AI, and Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) workloads are driving demand for an entirely new class of compute and storage infrastructure. headline: DDN and Supermicro Launch Driving AI Breakthroughs Experience at GTC 2026

(SMCI), a Total IT Solution Provider for AI/ML, HPC, Cloud, Storage, and 5G/Edge, and NVIDIA, powering advanced AI, today announced Driving AI Breakthroughs, a joint AI Factory initiative debuting at NVIDIA GTC 2026. headline: NVIDIA Launches Vera CPU, Purpose-Built for Agentic AI
summary: NVIDIA Vera CPU Delivers the Highest Performance and Energy Efficiency for Data Processing, AI Training and Agentic Inference at Scale NVIDIA Vera CPU Rack The NVIDIA Vera CPU is the world’s first processor purpose-built for the age of agentic AI and reinforcement learning — delivering results twice as efficiently and 50% faster than traditional rack-scale CPUs. headline: NVIDIA Launches BlueField-4 STX Storage Architecture With Broad Industry Adoption
summary: NVIDIA BlueField-4 STX Storage BlueField-4 STX is a modular reference architecture that enables enterprises, cloud and AI providers to easily deploy accelerated storage infrastructure capable of the long-context reasoning required for agentic AI. News Summary: New NVIDIA STX reference architecture provides up to 5x token throughput and up to 4x energy efficiency with 2x faster data ingestion.Early adopters of STX for context memory storage include CoreWeave, Crusoe, IREN, Lambda, Mistral AI, Neb

headline: Tesla Upgraded, Super Micro Computer Downgraded: Updated Rankings on Top Blue-Chip Stocks
summary: During these busy times, it pays to stay on top of the latest profit opportunities. And today’s blog post should be a great place to start. After taking a close look at the latest data on institutional buying pressure and each company’s fundamental health, I decided to revise my Stock Grader recommendations for 114 big blue chips. Chances are that you have at least one of these stocks in your portfolio, so you may want to give this list a skim and act accordingly. This Week’s Ratings Changes: Up
